definition.recommended_proxy_formula: Inception Hold APY with simple (linear) annualization: R = share_price_T / share_price_0 − 1; APY = R × (365.25 / days). No exit fee (matches UI Net fee treatment: performance fee already in share price; exit fee not in Net APY).
definition.why: Among trailing share-price Hold APYs (7d/30d/90d/180d/365d/inception × compound|simple), inception + simple annualization is empirically closest to the UI Net APY on the 2026-07-15 series, and matches Net fee treatment (perf fee in price, no exit fee). Official APY remains forward-looking; this is only a historical proxy for comparison.

fee_alignment.exit_fee: excluded (UI Net also excludes exit fee)

recommended_proxy.name: inception_hold_simple
recommended_proxy.notes: Inception Hold APY with simple (linear) annualization: R = share_price_T / share_price_0 − 1; APY = R × (365.25 / days). No exit fee (matches UI Net fee treatment: performance fee already in share price; exit fee not in Net APY).

empirical_best_on_this_series.name: inception_hold_simple
empirical_best_on_this_series.notes: Inception Hold APY with simple (linear) annualization: R = share_price_T / share_price_0 − 1; APY = R × (365.25 / days). No exit fee (matches UI Net fee treatment: performance fee already in share price; exit fee not in Net APY).

candidates_ranked_by_abs_delta_vs_net.name: inception_hold_simple
candidates_ranked_by_abs_delta_vs_net.notes: Inception Hold APY with simple (linear) annualization: R = share_price_T / share_price_0 − 1; APY = R × (365.25 / days). No exit fee (matches UI Net fee treatment: performance fee already in share price; exit fee not in Net APY).

candidates_ranked_by_abs_delta_vs_net.name: inception_hold_compound
candidates_ranked_by_abs_delta_vs_net.notes: Inception Hold APY with compound annualization: APY = (1+R)^(365.25/days) − 1. Same fee treatment as UI Net (no exit fee); repo default trailing method.
